/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/absl_ostringstream_test.dir/internal/ostringstream_test.cc.o -o ../../bin/absl_ostringstream_test  libabsl_strings_internal.a ../../lib/libgmock_main.a ../base/libabsl_base.a ../base/libabsl_spinlock_wait.a -lrt ../base/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.a ../base/libabsl_log_severity.a ../../lib/libgmock.a ../../lib/libgtest.a
